data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate a specific onboarding sequence for new customers, which includes a series of emails sent on specified days. However, the evidence provided does not confirm the existence of all required emails or their timing as outlined in the requirement. Specifically, while there is evidence of a welcome email, there is no evidence of the subsequent emails (Day 3, Day 7, Day 14, and Day 30) being scheduled or sent, indicating a gap in the onboarding sequence coverage.
gaps: Missing evidence for Day 3, Day 7, Day 14, and Day 30 emails in the onboarding sequence.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
